label: BMS — Conexpro
info:
Subscribes to the conexpro-bms-bridge state topic (default `bms/main/state`),
stashes the full snapshot in `flow.bms_latest`, and maps the project-relevant
fields into `global.telemetry` so the dashboard composer (`fn_assemble`) picks
them up.

The bridge already emits the canonical schema, so this flow does very little —
just availability tracking, the flow stash, and a tiny mapping into the
global telemetry the rest of the dashboard pipeline already reads.

Deploy alongside `services/conexpro-bms-bridge/` (sister Docker container).

Fields written into global.telemetry (consumed by fn_assemble):

  house_battery_percent  ← bms.soc_pct
  house_battery_voltage  ← bms.voltage_v
  house_battery_current  ← bms.current_a
  house_battery_power    ← bms.power_w

Flow context kept for ad-hoc reads (e.g. cell delta on the dashboard later):

  flow.bms_latest        full document (object, see service README)
  flow.bms_status        "online" / "offline"
  flow.bms_latest_at     epoch seconds of last successful read

name: stash + map → global.telemetry
track availability
